title: Tagged Hashes
description: Tagged hashes domain-separate hash inputs by hashing a tag into the digest context before the message payload. In Bitcoin they prevent different Taproot and Schnorr constructions from accidentally reusing the same hash domain.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures for secp256k1
resources.notes: Canonical definition of the tagged hashing construction used by Schnorr signatures.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.

resources.title: Decoding Bitcoin
resources.notes: Taproot module includes a learner-friendly tagged-hashes lesson in a broader prerequisite path.
